tasks.title: Reach 100% JS/TS/TSX/JSX compatibility with minimum code and maximum performance
tasks.notes: North star. 100% test262 + TypeScript conformance, native execution, no bytecode/JIT, minimum code, maximum performance. All work below is ordered low effort / high impact toward this goal, with complete fast Rust unit test coverage.

tasks.title: Establish spec test fixtures
tasks.notes: Define fixture format and directory layout under tests/spec_fixtures/. Every compatibility task must reference the fixture files it adds/fixes. Contributes to complete fast Rust unit test coverage.

tasks.title: Complete fast Rust unit test coverage
tasks.notes: Ensure every JS/TS/TSX/JSX spec behavior has a focused Rust unit test or fixture. Regressions caught in seconds. No feature/fix without a test.

tasks.title: Load real test262 harness includes
tasks.notes: P0 measurement blocker. 298 test262 tests are skipped because helpers are stubbed. Load $262, assert.compareArray, assert.throws, etc. High impact, medium effort.

tasks.title: Audit and shrink test262 feature skip list
tasks.notes: P0 measurement. Low effort, high impact. Remove outdated skip reasons so real failures surface and get fixed.

tasks.title: Preserve thrown values in try/catch/throw
tasks.notes: P0 quick win. Low effort, high impact. Stop stringifying exceptions; negative tests need real error types.

tasks.title: Improve negative-test matching by type and phase
tasks.notes: P0 measurement. Low effort, high impact. Match test262 negative tests by expected error type/phase instead of coarse string comparison.

tasks.title: typeof undeclared returns "undefined"
tasks.notes: P1 quick win. Trivial fix, high impact. Many typeof tests and TS typeofOperator failures. Fixture: tests/spec_fixtures/expressions/typeof_undeclared.js.

tasks.title: Remove the while-loop 10-iteration cap
tasks.notes: COMPLETED: Fixed control flow bugs in eval_while and eval_for. The original issue was a double take_control_flow() call in both functions, and eval_block consuming the control flow. Fixed by: 1) Removing first take_control_flow() call in eval_while/eval_for, 2) Using peek_control_flow() in eval_statements to check without consuming, 3) Fixed eval_block to not consume control flow, 4) Added peek_control_flow() to control_flow.rs. Tests: interpreter_bugs::test_while_loop_with_continue, test_while_loop_break_after_many_iterations, test_while_loop_hundred_iterations, test_while_loop_over_ten_iterations, test_while_loop_counter_pattern all pass.

tasks.title: Install String.prototype once instead of per-access closures
tasks.notes: P1 quick win. Low effort, high impact. Every string property access currently allocates a closure.

tasks.title: Remove redundant Context::globals HashMap
tasks.notes: P1 cleanup. Low effort, removes duplicated global storage and extra clones.

tasks.title: Avoid cloning array elements in builtin methods
tasks.notes: P1 quick win. Low effort, high impact. Array methods clone the elements vector; operate on mutable borrow instead.

tasks.title: Share function bodies via Rc<[Statement]>
tasks.notes: P0 performance. Low effort, high impact. Stop cloning function bodies on every Value clone.

tasks.title: Complete expression syntax gaps
tasks.notes: P0 broad win. Medium effort, very high impact. Template literals, computed keys, spread, ??, ?., delete, unary +, for-of. Unblocks 100+ TS expression failures.

tasks.title: Register Array, Error, Date as constructors
tasks.notes: P0 broad win. Medium effort, very high impact. Blocks thousands of built-in tests and any new Array/Error.

tasks.title: Implement var hoisting and let/const TDZ
tasks.notes: P1 correctness. Medium effort, high impact. Fixes large swath of variable-scope tests and 'x is not defined' failures.

tasks.title: Implement arguments object in functions
tasks.notes: P1 correctness. Medium effort, high impact. Legacy function-argument tests and TS functionCalls failures.

tasks.title: Arrow function use strict validation
tasks.notes: P1 correctness. Medium effort, high impact. Strict mode enforcement; unblocks onlyStrict tests and changes this/globals behavior.

tasks.title: Use global object as environment record
tasks.notes: P1 correctness. Medium effort, medium-high impact. globalThis/variable parity.

tasks.title: Implement property descriptors and defineProperty
tasks.notes: P1 correctness. High effort, high impact. Object semantics, getters/setters, built-in attribute checks.

tasks.title: Enforce granular unit-test policy
tasks.notes: Process enabler. One behavior, one test; every task lists test file/name. Updated EXECUTE.md and docs/hir-design.md.

tasks.title: Add JS/TS scenario test harness
tasks.notes: Process enabler. Run real JS/TS snippets from Rust tests. High impact, medium effort.

tasks.title: Runtime optimization roadmap
tasks.notes: Tracking task. Findings in docs/runtime-optimization-roadmap.md.

tasks.title: Address strict linting violations (500-line files, 40-line functions, complexity 10)
tasks.notes: PARTIALLY COMPLETE: Fixed quench-runtime violations. Remaining violations in src/ and xtask/ directories. FIXED in quench-runtime: split comparison.rs into smaller functions, fixed lower/expressions.rs, lower/statements.rs, lower/patterns.rs, conformance/typescript/mod.rs, conformance/typescript/skip.rs, test262/runner.rs, tests/conformance.rs, split runtime_issues.rs into runtime_issues_basic.rs and runtime_issues_math.rs. REMAINING violations (cannot touch per contract): src/bridge/ffi.rs, src/bridge_reg.rs, src/cli.rs, src/hotreload.rs, src/main.rs, src/event_loop.rs, xtask/src/main.rs. Files marked 'off-limits' in contract (bridge/, ink/, render/) have violations but cannot be fixed without breaking bridge functionality.

tasks.title: Implement trampoline interpreter with explicit call stack
tasks.notes: P0 architecture. Very high impact, high effort. Replaces recursive AST walker; required to run whole test262 suites.

tasks.title: Implement native ES module support for Quench apps
tasks.notes: P0 feature. High impact, high effort. Native import/export instead of stripping.

tasks.title: Class support and conformance skip fixes
tasks.notes: P0 feature. Medium-high effort, very high impact. Classes, super, extends, static fields.

tasks.title: Implement real Promise resolution and microtasks
tasks.notes: P0 feature. Medium effort, very high impact. Async/await/generators depend on this.

tasks.title: Leverage Rust for runtime execution model
tasks.notes: High impact, high effort. Rust ownership/explicit-stack patterns. Supports trampoline and HIR.

tasks.title: Implement the typed HIR execution model
tasks.notes: Very high impact, very high effort. Type-aware HIR + trampoline. Depends on Tasks 85 and quick-win cleanup.

tasks.title: Analyze and enable whole-suite conformance runs
tasks.notes: High impact, high effort analysis. Whole-suite test262/TS runs and regression tracking.
